name: Main Governing Requirements
description: Core requirements applicable to all projects, regardless of the selected standard.

documents.name: VVM - Project Level Validation & Verification Manual
documents.content:
Manual for validation and verification of project-level GHG reduction activities:

- Applies to project validation (validation of project design documents)
- Applies to project verification (verification of emission reduction claims)
- Covers methodologies, baseline scenarios, and monitoring plan assessment
- Requires evidence of additionality and permanence
- Mandates detailed sampling plans for verification activities
- Specifies documentation requirements for project activities

documents.name: VVM - Organizational Level Verification Manual
documents.content:
Manual for verification of organizational-level GHG statements:

- Applies to GHG inventory verification (ISO 14064-1 inventories)
- Applies to CORSIA verification (airline emission reports)
- Covers organizational boundary assessment
- Requires verification of Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions
- Mandates materiality assessment and error detection
- Specifies requirements for data management systems verification
- Requires evidence of calculation methodologies and emission factors
